pkgmetadata.longdescription: noctalia-qs is a custom fork of Quickshell - a flexible QtQuick-based desktop shell toolkit for Wayland. It serves as the shell framework powering Noctalia Shell.

use.flag: Enable x11-wm/i3 and gui-wm/sway specific features
Enable wlroots layershell integration through the zwlr-layer-shell-v1 protocol
Enable access to MPRIS compatible media players using its dbus protocol
Enable gui-wm/niri specific integrations via its IPC protocol
Enable viewing and management of media-video/pipewire nodes
Enable streaming video from monitors and toplevel windows through various protocols
Enable session lock support through the ext-session-lock-v1 protocol
Enable Unix Sockets (WARNING: Disabling is unsafe!)
Enable management of windows through zwlr-foreign-toplevel-management-v1 protocol
Enable system tray support using the status notifier dbus protocol
